# Product Harmonized System (menu entry)

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds a menu entry for **H.S. Codes**. This menu entry is
available under *Inventory > Configuration > Products*.
